THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EPSHTEIN, YAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,350.00, THE REPAIR ESTIMATE IS EXCESSIVE RELATIVE TO THE VISIBLE DAMAGE FROM THIS ACCIDENT AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THE REPAIRS ARE REASONABLY NECESSARY AND RELATED TO THIS ACCIDENT.
